summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations planned. Classified hydrated PRs conservatively, routed security-sensitive/security-linked PRs, kept already-closed PRs skipped, and marked refs missing live artifact state as needs_human because target_updated_at could not be copied from the preflight artifact.
